---
title: "2026 Econometric Models of Climate Change Conference"
subtitle: "EMCC-X"
image: /images/earth_day_cc.png
---

![Aalborg, Denmark](/images/emccx/Aalborg-City.jpg){fig-alt="Aalborg, Denmark"}

The 10th Conference on Econometric Models of Climate Change (EMCC-X) will be held at [Aalborg University](https://en.aau.dk/), Denmark, on August 20-21, 2026.

The conference brings together economists, econometricians, climate scientists, statisticians, and policy researchers to improve our understanding of climate change, its impacts, and effective policy solutions. The EMCC conference series was established in 2016 and has been supported by themed issues of the Journal of Econometrics, Energy Economics, the International Journal of Forecasting, and Advances in Econometrics. Previous iterations of the conference are linked [here](https://sites.google.com/view/emccconference/conferences).

## Important Dates

- **Conference Dates:** August 20-21, 2026

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/add-to-calendar-button@2" async defer></script>

<add-to-calendar-button
  name="EMCC-X Conference"
  description="2026 Econometric Models of Climate Change Conference"
  startDate="2026-08-20"
  startTime="08:00"
  endDate="2026-08-21"
  endTime="17:30"
  timeZone="Europe/Copenhagen"
  location="AAU CREATE, Rendsburggade 14, 9000 Aalborg."
  options="'Google','Apple', 'iCal','Microsoft365'"
  trigger="click"
  hideIconList
  hidecheckmark
  lightMode="light"
></add-to-calendar-button>

- **Registration Deadline:** June 30, 2026


<!---
<details>
<summary>📅 Add to Calendar</summary>

- [Google Calendar](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=Your%20Event&dates=20251015T140000Z/20251015T153000Z&location=Copenhagen)
- [Outlook](https://outlook.office.com/calendar/0/deeplink/compose?subject=Your%20Event&startdt=2025-10-15T14:00:00&enddt=2025-10-15T15:30:00&location=Copenhagen)
- [Download .ics file](event.ics)

</details>
--->

## Registration

Register here: [The 10th Conference on Econometric Models of Climate Change (EMCC-X) Registration – Fill out form](https://forms.office.com/e/ygRR7tbw9K)

Thanks to support from the Danish Data Science Academy and the Carlsberg Foundation, there is no registration fee and the conference dinner is included. We welcome colleagues who aren’t presenting to join us, however, because capacity is limited, priority will be given to presenters and co-authors on accepted papers. Non-presenter registrations will remain open on a first-come, first-served basis until capacity is reached. 

Registration deadline: June 30, 2026.


## Venue

The conference will be held at CREATE, Department of Architecture, Design, and Media Technology at Aalborg University. [Rendsburggade 14, 9000 Aalborg.](https://maps.app.goo.gl/MuY1dPZksKR6hGvr8)

::: {.callout-note title="Map" icon=false collapse="true"}

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d4340.360886956535!2d9.928553499999998!3d57.04845069999999!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x4649329294ac998b%3A0xbd50d3ce4a38634c!2sDepartment%20of%20Architecture%2C%20Design%20and%20Media%20Technology!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sdk!4v1760252606588!5m2!1sen!2sdk" width="500" height="400" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"></iframe>

:::


## Travel Information

Aalborg University is located in Aalborg, Denmark. The nearest airport is [Aalborg Airport (AAL)](https://aal.dk/en), which has direct flights to and from several European cities. Alternatively, you can fly into [Copenhagen Airport (CPH)](https://cph.dk/en) or [Billund Airport (BLL)](https://bll.dk/en) and take a domestic flight or train to Aalborg. 


## Hotel Recommendations

Recommended hotels include [Cabinn](https://www.cabinn.com/hotel/cabinn-aalborg) and [Pier 5](https://pier5.dk/).

- [Cabinn](https://www.cabinn.com/hotel/cabinn-aalborg), book directly at the website and use the Corporate/Promotion Code: CSTG26.

- [Pier 5](https://pier5.dk/), use [this link to book directly](https://app.mews.com/distributor/d08f68f1-882b-40e5-a130-b00000a68664?mewsAvailabilityBlockId=b34d03d1-89f8-4682-8fac-b44200583625&mewsStart=2026-08-19&mewsEnd=2026-08-22).

- [Kompas Hotel Aalborg](https://aal-bookyourstay.bookyourstay.eu/booking/haa/room?pricecalculationratecode=BAR&promotioncode=BOOK10&lang=en-GB), book directly using this link or at the website and use the Promotion Code: BOOK10.

Other downtown options within walking distance:

- [B&B Hotel Aalborg](https://www.hotel-bb.com/en/hotel/aalborg)

- [Four Points by Sheraton](https://www.marriott.com/da/reservation/rateListMenu.mi)

### Accommodation Grants

We can cover 3 nights hotel costs (Aug 19–22) for a small number of attendees with demonstrated need who otherwise would be unable to attend. 

Application deadline has passed, but if you require financial support to attend the conference, please contact one of the local organisers.

## Organising Committee

### Local Organisers

- [Olivia Kvist](https://www.linkedin.com/in/olivia-kvist-813251216/), PhD Student in Climate Econometrics, Aalborg University, Denmark.
- [J. Eduardo Vera-Valdés](https://everval.github.io/), Associate Professor of Mathematics-Economics, Aalborg University, Denmark.

### Conference Board

- [Marina Friedrich](https://research.vu.nl/en/persons/marina-friedrich), Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, The Netherlands
- [Eric Hillebrand](https://sites.google.com/site/erichillebrand/), Aarhus University, Denmark
- [Felix Pretis](https://www.uvic.ca/socialsciences/economics/faculty-staff/faculty-profiles/pretis-felix.php), University of Victoria, Canada
- [Tommaso Proietti](https://economia.uniroma2.it/faculty/12/proietti-tommaso), U. degli Studi di Roma “Tor Vergata”, Italy

### Join the Research Network

Sign up to the [Research Network Mailing list](https://sites.google.com/view/emccconference/network) to stay up-to-date.

## Sponsors

This event is supported by the [Danish Data Science Academy DDSA](https://ddsa.dk/) and [Carlsberg Foundation](https://www.carlsbergfondet.dk/) (Grant CF25-2085). 

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](/images/DDSA_PrimaryLogo.png){fig-alt="Danish Data Science Academy Logo." width=70%}

![](/images/Carlsbergfondet_logo_2-liner_UK_RGB_BLACK.png){fig-alt="Carlsberg Foundation Logo." width=50%}


:::
